name: QueueMosiData
title: QueueMosiData
syntax: SensorErrorCode SysVarNamespace.QueueMosiData(byte buffer[], dword bitCount); // from 1
SensorErrorCode SysVarNamespace.QueueMosiData(byte buffer [], dword bitCount, dword delayNs); // from 2
description: This method is intended to be used for SPI master simulation. It inserts the given MOSI data into the send queue from the master to the given slave.

parameters.name: buffer
parameters.description: The array of bytes that shall be put into the masters send queue. The bytes of the array will be output in the order they are specified. The bits of the bytes will be output MSB first. Example: The byte array { 0xD1, 0x3B } will be output as 11010001 00111011.

parameters.name: bitCount
parameters.description: The length of the data in bits. Must be at least 2.

parameters.name: delayNs
parameters.description: If this parameter is provided, the master will wait the specified amount of time before actually sending the data.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
